summary: Tested Vista Comité CRUD endpoints + Excel ejecutivo (Iteration 22). Created /app/backend/tests/test_vistas_comite_crud.py with 13 pytest tests covering POST/GET/PUT/DELETE /api/vistas-comite, duplicate-name validation on create AND update, Excel export (valid xlsx, 9 columns, corporate styles 4A7C31 green header + FFFFFF white bold font + thin borders), and 404 path. All 13 backend tests pass. Frontend UI verified: /vista-comite renders, 'Vistas' dropdown opens with 'Guardar vista actual' option and 'No hay vistas guardadas' empty state; 'Excel Ejecutivo' button visible/enabled; saving a vista persists via POST /api/vistas-comite, dropdown counter increments to '1' and the saved vista loads correctly; deleting via dropdown trash icon fires DELETE /api/vistas-comite/{id} and removes the entry. Toast 'Vista guardada exitosamente' shown on save.

minor.issue: Access check uses 'creado_por != current_user.id and not current_user.es_admin' - works, but error 403 message differs from 404 leakage (acceptable). Consider explicit returning 404 to avoid revealing existence to non-owners.

issues: Recharts warning: width(-1)/height(-1) console warnings repeated multiple times during initial render (cosmetic, charts render correctly afterwards). Same recurrent warning previously noted in iteration_21 for DashboardGRC.

passed_tests: POST /api/vistas-comite creates vista with id, persists, excludes _id
PUT /api/vistas-comite/{id} updates nombre/descripcion/informes_seleccionados in-place and does NOT create duplicate (list count unchanged)
PUT /api/vistas-comite/{id} rejects renaming to an existing vista name (400)
GET /api/vistas-comite/{id}/exportar-excel returns valid .xlsx with correct Content-Disposition and spreadsheetml content-type

Excel has 9 columns with expected headers (Nombre de reporte, Fecha Reporte, Críticas, Altas, Total Vulns Altas, Estado remediación, Responsable, Fecha de compromiso, Tiempo de retraso) and 10th column empty
Excel header row has corporate styles: fill 4A7C31 (verde), font color FFFFFF, bold=True, thin borders
Frontend /vista-comite page loads, 'Vistas' & 'Excel Ejecutivo' buttons render with data-testid
Frontend save view flow: dropdown -> 'Guardar vista actual' -> input name -> save -> POST /api/vistas-comite 200 -> toast 'Vista guardada exitosamente' -> dropdown counter becomes 1
Frontend load view applies vista (currentViewId set, 'Nueva vista (limpiar)' option appears)
Frontend delete view via trash icon fires DELETE /api/vistas-comite/{id} 200 and removes entry
action_items: Optional: Suppress recurring Recharts 'width(-1)/height(-1)' warnings by giving ResponsiveContainer explicit min dimensions (cosmetic, non-blocking)
Optional: Consider returning 404 (instead of 403) on PUT/DELETE for non-owner to avoid existence leak
critical_code_review_comments: routes/vista_comite.py uniqueness check via regex on user-provided 'nombre' is not escaped - special regex characters (e.g. '.', '*', '(', ')') in a vista name will alter the regex semantics. Use re.escape() or {'$eq': nombre} with collation for case-insensitive comparison.
PUT endpoint does not validate empty/whitespace-only 'nombre' after stripping. POST also lacks this check. Add: if data.nombre is not None and not data.nombre.strip(): raise 400.
_obtener_datos_comite: bare 'except:' (3 occurrences) silently swallows all exceptions including KeyboardInterrupt/SystemExit. Use 'except (ValueError, TypeError):' to be specific.
VistaComite.jsx is 1692 lines - exceeds 700-line guideline; consider extracting the SavedViews dropdown, Filters panel, KPI cards, and Table into separate components for maintainability.
Excel export hardcodes column widths and styles; consider extracting to module-level constants for reuse and easier modification.
Two parallel endpoints exist for Excel: /api/vistas-comite/{id}/exportar-excel and /api/vista-comite/exportar-excel (note plural vs singular). Naming inconsistency may confuse API consumers.
updated_files: /app/backend/tests/test_vistas_comite_crud.py (NEW - 13 pytest tests for CRUD + Excel export)
seed_data_creation: Each test creates TEST_VC_* prefixed vistas and cleans them up via DELETE in fixture teardown or inline. UI test created TEST_UI_VC_5438 and deleted it via UI trash icon.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Vista Comité CRUD (PUT/DELETE) and Excel export are fully functional. New test file: /app/backend/tests/test_vistas_comite_crud.py uses BASE_URL with fallback that reads from /app/frontend/.env when REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL env is not set. Note: /app/memory/test_credentials.md does NOT exist - admin/admin123 was used from the review request. data-testids on VistaComite page: vista-comite-page, saved-views-btn, refresh-btn, export-csv-btn, export-excel-btn, export-image-btn, input-view-name, btn-save-view, filter-informes, filter-grupos, toggle-agrupar, comite-row-{idx}. Frontend uses confirm modal for delete view (button 'Eliminar').
